import asyncio


async def sync_one(order_id: str) -> None:
    if order_id == "bad":
        raise RuntimeError(order_id)


async def sync_all(ids: list[str]) -> None:
    tasks = [asyncio.create_task(sync_one(order_id)) for order_id in ids]
    await asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=False)
